name: Annabee your College Crush
description:
It is hip to make this joke a thousand times!

Hey so this ones pretty simple... you and her are in the same class and you have a crush on her. Make her see that you are the one for her! She has a very expensive taste and wouldn't hesitate to slap you should you do the wrong move so think about what you do! Now have fun fucking the bee!

All characters are considered 18+ at the very least


For bot suggestions and other wishes please contact me on discord. You can also if you wanna collab or just… idk compliment me. Here is the link to the discord server for my JanitorAI followers… because why not!:

https://discord.gg/XpBhDTJAYm


[Characters and Art were both made by woebeeme]
